items.q: Name the currency used in Switzerland.
items.explanation: The national currency of Switzerland is the Swiss franc.

items.q: Name the currency used in United Kingdom.
items.explanation: The national currency of United Kingdom is the pound sterling.

items.q: What is the official currency of Turkey?
Name the currency used in Vietnam.
items.explanation: The national currency of Vietnam is the dong.

items.q: Name the currency used in China.
items.explanation: The national currency of China is the yuan.

items.q: Name the currency used in Japan.
items.explanation: The national currency of Japan is the yen.

items.q: Name the currency used in Turkey.
items.explanation: The national currency of Turkey is the lira.

items.q: Canberra is the largest Australian city by population.
items.explanation: This reflects medium-difficulty geography and civics knowledge.

items.q: Name the currency used in Indonesia.
items.explanation: The national currency of Indonesia is the rupiah.

items.q: The Equator passes through both Africa and South America.
items.explanation: This reflects medium-difficulty geography and civics knowledge.
